name: Crockpot Round Steak with Rich Gravy
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of mushroom soup, condensed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into 4-6 serving size pieces.
2. Place the steak pieces in the crockpot.
3. Add the onion soup mix (1 1/2 oz. sized package), water, and mushroom soup to the pot.
4. Cover and cook on low for 6-8 hours.
5. Remove the steak to a platter.
6. Serve the gravy on the side with mashed potatoes, another side dish, or a green salad.
7. Serve with hot buttered rolls.
